    • keyName

      public abstract ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorerJsonMatchExpression.Builder keyName(String keyName)
      Setter for keyName.

      keyName: The key name to find the value in the parsed response that's in JSON format. Only first-level key matching is supported.

    • clearKeyName

      @CanIgnoreReturnValue public ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorerJsonMatchExpression.Builder clearKeyName()
      Clears the value of keyName field.

    • valueStringMatchExpression

      public abstract ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorerJsonMatchExpression.Builder valueStringMatchExpression(ReinforcementTuningStringMatchRewardScorerStringMatchExpression valueStringMatchExpression)
      Setter for valueStringMatchExpression.

      valueStringMatchExpression: String match expression to match against the extracted value from the JSON representation of the parsed response.

      valueStringMatchExpression: String match expression to match against the extracted value from the JSON representation of the parsed response.
